notes: Chinese ASAT missile test. Largest single debris event in history.
Collided with Iridium 33. First major hypervelocity satellite collision.
Decommissioned weather satellite suffered battery/pressure vessel breakup.
Indian Mission Shakti ASAT test. Most fragments decayed rapidly.
Presumed battery or propulsion system explosion at high LEO.
H-2 rocket upper stage residual propellant explosion.
First historical recorded on-orbit fragmentation event.
Sudden power system failure and catastrophic battery rupture.
US Operation Burnt Frost ASAT interception using an SM-3 missile.
Communications satellite experienced total electronic breakup due to solar storm.
